title: DfE update 7 January 2026
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 advanced learner loans performance management point 2   Action Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund for defined vulnerable groups funding claims   Information National Apprenticeship Week 2026   Your feedback Share your feedback on adult funding communications     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Financial statements deadline has passed   Action Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund for defined vulnerable groups funding claims   Information Maximising value for pupils programme   Information National Apprenticeship Week 2026   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Contract works workshop   Events and webinars Spring term webinars and power hours for school business professionals     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action 2025 to 2026 advanced learner loans performance management point 2   Action Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund for defined vulnerable groups funding claims   Information Maximising value for pupils programme   Information Publication of the early years termly funding allocation tool   Information Local authority proforma tool (APT) webinar December 2025 now uploaded to the DfE YouTube channel   Information National Apprenticeship Week 2026   Your feedback Share your feedback on adult funding communications   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement members only: Contract works workshop   Events and webinars Spring term webinars and power hours for school business professionals    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
